title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Municipal Tricycle Pedicab Franchising and Regulatory Board (MTPFRB) Resolution No. 2022-06 Dated July 27, 2022 Entitled ? Resolution Requesting the Local Chief Executive Through the Tricycle Regulatory Unit (TRU) to Recognize the Legal Personality of the Dabactoda in Their Terminal As Mandated by Ordinance No. 2011-1082.
